title: Cocktail
tmdbOverview: A shy simple traditional girl leaves her family in India for her new husband in London, where she meets a shameless flirt and a complicated party girl.
synopsis: Cocktail is a 2012 romance, drama and comedy film from India. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 15 certification (IE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
